metadata.title: LoreForge
metadata.description: LoreForge frontend for campaigns, character sheets, and real-time maps.

login.title: LoreForge
login.tagline: The truth lies beyond the veil. Forge your investigation, track clues, and command the paranormal.
login.disclaimer: LoreForge is an unofficial VTT platform.

home.subtitle: Select Your Path
home.title: How will you face the entities?

gm.title: Gamemaster
gm.description: Control the secrets, design the investigation, orchestrate encounters with terrifying entities, and guide your players through the darkness.

player.title: Investigator
player.description: Manage your character sheets, track your traits and attributes, roll your dice pool, and prepare to face what lies in the shadows.

jogador.title: Investigators
jogador.subtitle: Manage and select your active character sheets.
jogador.emptyDescription: Create one by clicking the + button at the bottom right corner of your screen.
jogador.toastDescription: You will soon be able to build and configure your investigator sheet.

mestre.title: Gamemaster Command
mestre.subtitle: Manage your campaigns, track monsters, and construct NPCs.

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.description: Manage your campaigns. Click the + button to create a new campaign.
campaigns.toastDescription: You will soon be able to start new paranormal campaigns.

monsters.title: Monsters
monsters.description: Manage your monsters. Click the + button to create a new monster.
monsters.toastDescription: A custom creature forge is coming soon to design entities.

npcs.title: NPCs
npcs.description: Manage your NPCs. Click the + button to create a new NPC.
npcs.toastDescription: You will soon be able to register ally and enemy NPCs.
